---
title: "STAT405 Proposal"
output: pdf_document
author: "Lily Wang, Sky Yun, Zhengxi Yuan"
date: "2026-03-09"
---

Repository Link: https://github.com/yun-sky/STAT-405-Project

## Datasets:
US Housing Prices:
https://github.com/yun-sky/STAT-405-Project/blob/74fe7a971074d01e14c2f963169d763a828c1966/Datasets/US_House_Price.csv 

Economic Factors:
https://github.com/yun-sky/STAT-405-Project/blob/74fe7a971074d01e14c2f963169d763a828c1966/Datasets/MSPUS.csv 

## Link to dataset websites:
US Housing Prices:
https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/jyotsnagurjar/factors-influencing-us-house-prices?resource=download 

Economic Factors:
https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/MSPUS 


```{r}
library(dplyr)

economics_factors <- read.csv("Datasets/US_House_Price.csv")
house_price <- read.csv("Datasets/MSPUS.csv")
house_price <- rename(house_price, DATE = observation_date)

dataset <- merge(house_price, economics_factors, by = "DATE")
head(dataset)
```

## Scientific Questions
1. How well does a Bayesian linear regression model fitted on economic predictors, such as blank and blank, predict quarterly median US house prices compared to ordinary least squares regression?

2. How well does a Bayesian linear regression model fitted on blank and blank, predict quarterly median US house prices compared to another BLR fitted on a different set of predictors?


## Methodology


## Group Contributions
